headline: Nike Continues a Troubled 2026 But Has Potential to Double According to Morningstar
summary: Nike has lost nearly a third of its value in 2026 while one major analyst firm sees a potential double from current prices, putting the stock at the center of a fierce debate between patient value buyers and skeptics calling it a value trap.

headline: Investors Heavily Search lululemon athletica inc. (LULU): Here is What You Need to Know
summary: Lululemon (LULU) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.
